paths.name: dayjs
paths.message: Do not directly import dayjs. Only import the dayjs exported from 'lib/dayjs'.

paths.name: chart.js
paths.message: Do not directly import chart.js. Only import the Chart and friends exported from 'lib/Chart'.

paths.name: chart.js/auto
paths.message: Do not directly import chart.js/auto. Only import the Chart and friends exported from 'lib/Chart'.

paths.name: ~/queries/schema
paths.message: Import from 'queries/schema/schema-foo' to avoid Webpack/Sucrase enum export issues.

paths.name: monaco-editor
paths.message: Value imports of monaco-editor statically couple ~4 MB of editor code into your chunk. Use `import type`, or render via the lazy facade in lib/monaco/CodeEditor.

paths.name: lib/monaco/CodeEditorImpl
paths.message: Import CodeEditor from lib/monaco/CodeEditor instead — the lazy facade keeps monaco out of your chunk.

paths.name: ~/lib/monaco/CodeEditorImpl
paths.message: Import CodeEditor from lib/monaco/CodeEditor instead — the lazy facade keeps monaco out of your chunk.

paths.name: @posthog/brand/hoggies
paths.message: Inline-SVG hoggies bundle up to ~1 MB of JS each. Use the PNG export instead: import * as name from '@posthog/brand/hoggies/png/<name>' and wrap with pngHoggie from lib/brand/hoggies. If you truly need vector output, add an oxlint-disable comment stating why.

paths.name: @posthog/brand/hoggies/svg
paths.message: Inline-SVG hoggies bundle up to ~1 MB of JS each. Use the PNG export instead: import * as name from '@posthog/brand/hoggies/png/<name>' and wrap with pngHoggie from lib/brand/hoggies. If you truly need vector output, add an oxlint-disable comment stating why.

paths.name: @posthog/brand/hoggies/png
paths.message: Import the per-asset stub instead: import * as name from '@posthog/brand/hoggies/png/<name>'. The barrel pulls every hoggie's stub into the graph.

patterns.message: Inline-SVG hoggies bundle up to ~1 MB of JS each. Use the PNG export instead: import * as name from '@posthog/brand/hoggies/png/<name>' and wrap with pngHoggie from lib/brand/hoggies. If you truly need vector output, add an oxlint-disable comment stating why.

forbid.message: style should be avoided in favor of utility CSS classes - see https://storybook.dev.posthog.dev/?path=/docs/lemon-ui-utilities--overview
use flex or space utility classes instead

jest/no-restricted-matchers.toBeDefined: Do not use .toBeDefined() in tests, use .toBeTruthy() or .not.toBeUndefined() instead.

no-restricted-globals.name: fetch
no-restricted-globals.message: Use the injected HttpClient (e.g. ctx.http.fetch in tools, this.http.fetch in services). Bare global fetch bypasses the smokescreen proxy in prod.

patterns.message: The toolbar ships to customer pages and must not depend on app scenes. Import from lib/, or fetch via toolbarFetch. Existing exceptions are being removed per .agents/toolbar-migration.md; the full transitive boundary is enforced by frontend/bin/check-toolbar-graph.mjs.
The toolbar must not import product manifests or product frontends — that pulls the whole product graph into the customer-facing bundle. See .agents/toolbar-migration.md.
The toolbar must not import app layout or global models. See .agents/toolbar-migration.md.

paths.name: lib/api
paths.message: Toolbar code must use toolbarFetch/toolbarApi (authorized via toolbar params), not the app's api client.

paths.name: ~/lib/api
paths.message: Toolbar code must use toolbarFetch/toolbarApi (authorized via toolbar params), not the app's api client.

patterns.message: Sandbox renderer must not import the conversation API. Use products/tasks/frontend/generated/api for task data.
Sandbox renderer must not import api.conversations. Use api.tasks.* and products/tasks/frontend/generated/api.

paths.name: scenes/max/maxThreadLogic
paths.message: Sandbox module must not import maxThreadLogic (conversation orchestration). Forbidden by design boundary.

paths.name: scenes/max/maxContextLogic
paths.message: Sandbox module must not import maxContextLogic. Forbidden by design boundary.

paths.name: scenes/max/maxLogic
paths.message: Sandbox module must not import maxLogic. Forbidden by design boundary.

paths.name: scenes/max/maxGlobalLogic
paths.message: Sandbox module must not import maxGlobalLogic. Forbidden by design boundary.

paths.name: scenes/max/maxTypes
paths.message: Avoid importing maxTypes from the sandbox module. Extract needed types (e.g. SandboxToolCallMessage) into products/posthog_ai/frontend/sandbox/types/ instead.
